creator: pluknet@gmail.com
text:
memdev.h in mips has a whitespace discrepancy with regard to other arches.

namely, all other arches have:
#define<TAB>CDEV_MINOR_KMEM<TAB>1

while mips has:
#define<TAB>CDEV_MINOR_KMEM<SPACE>1

Fix: Bring in to common appearance.

Patch attached with submission follows:
